roadmap.title: Story start and opportunistic combat
roadmap.description: Play through Sequence 4 on Easy, taking the automatic story unlocks and simple combat, food, diving and exploration achievements as opportunities appear. Use a manual save before Sequence 2 Memory 6 if you want the guaranteed rogue wave for Unsinkable.

roadmap.title: Great Inagua, officers and fleet
roadmap.description: After Sequence 4 Memory 1, restore Great Inagua, begin every officer/Templar quest, and keep five Brigs running piracy missions for Dilettante art rewards. Build money and materials through boarding rather than grinding them at the end.

roadmap.title: Diving and world completion
roadmap.description: After Sequence 6 Memory 1 unlocks the diving bell, clear all seven shipwrecks and their 68 chests, visit every location, capture forts, collect portraits and interact with all eight friendly animals as the story opens the map.

roadmap.title: Finish the story and endgame naval work
roadmap.description: Finish the remaining sequences, recruit the final officers, collect the 12 Ultimate Plans and fully upgrade the Jackdaw before challenging the five legendary encounters.

roadmap.title: Manor, RNG and final cleanup
roadmap.description: Fill every manor display, finish cumulative counters, then farm the rare Burning Ship chair with a manual-save/fast-travel loop. Free roam remains available, so nothing is permanently lost.

achievements.description: Take a seat on the deck of a rare Burning Ship event.
achievements.summary: Sit in the @item{chair} on the rare chair variant of a @mechanic{Burning Ship} event.

guide.context: Burning Ships are timed white world events; only a small fraction spawn with the required chair on deck. Wait until @loc{Black Trench} is available after Sequence 6 Memory 1.

steps.text: Make a manual save inside the @loc{Great Inagua manor} at 826,444, then fast-travel to @loc{Black Trench} at 184,425.
Use the spyglass immediately and look for a white timed Burning Ship icon. If none appears—or its deck has no chair—reload the manual save and repeat the fast travel.
When the chair variant appears, sail over before the five-minute event expires, board the already-burning wreck and use the interaction prompt to sit in the chair at mid-deck.

achievements.description: Capture all forts
achievements.summary: Capture all 11 @mechanic{forts} across the Caribbean.

guide.context: Forts are the red tower icons visible from sea. All remain available in free roam.

steps.text: Approach each fort to reveal its defenses, then use the Jackdaw to destroy every marked tower.
Dock at the damaged fort, storm the walls, kill the marked officers and open the command-room gate.
Repeat for all 11 forts; the achievement unlocks when the last fort changes to friendly control.

achievements.description: Display all character portraits in the Great Inagua manor
achievements.summary: Collect all 11 @item{character portraits} and hang them in the @loc{Great Inagua manor}.

guide.context: Do this after the story: portraits only appear when their story gates are met and are revealed on the map only at close range. After collecting all 11, hang them in the manor's 11 frames (3 near the fleet room, 1 bedroom, 1 stairwell and 6 treasure cellar).

collectibles.name: Julien Du Casse
collectibles.method: Pick it up inside the manor.

collectibles.name: Laureano de Torres
collectibles.method: Climb down from the wooden board above the open window and enter the tower.

collectibles.name: El Tiburón
collectibles.method: Use the exterior corner scaffold to reach the open window; the Codex incorrectly labels this one Castillo.

collectibles.name: Commodore Chamberlaine
collectibles.method: Climb through an upper-floor window and collect it inside.

collectibles.name: Woodes Rogers
collectibles.method: Collect it after reaching Sequence 12 Memory 1.

collectibles.name: Laurens Prins
collectibles.method: Enter after completing Sequence 5 Memory 3.

collectibles.name: Ben Hornigold
collectibles.method: Search the wreck on the island's north-east shore.

collectibles.name: Bartholomew Roberts
collectibles.method: After Sequence 9 Memory 2, return via the white P icon at 939,415 and search the camp tent.

collectibles.name: Blackbeard
collectibles.location: Blackbeard's Treasure side quest, Anotto Bay 590,245
collectibles.method: After Sequence 8 Memory 1, finish the cave treasure route, then open the updated quest chest at Great Inagua.

collectibles.name: Stede Bonnet
collectibles.location: Captain Stede Bonnet side quest, Great Inagua 827,442
collectibles.method: After Sequence 8 Memory 3, follow the quest to the stranded schooner on Mystery Island at 906,123 and finish its marked objectives.

collectibles.name: Robert Maynard
collectibles.location: Port Royal below the central viewpoint, 602,134
collectibles.method: After Sequence 11 Memory 3 and recruiting Lucy/Padre, advance the eight-part A World Without Gold chain to Reach Maynard's Treasure; collect it during or after the finale.

achievements.description: Fill all Art Collection and Equipment slots in the Great Inagua manor
achievements.summary: Fill every @mechanic{Art Collection} and @mechanic{Equipment} slot in the @loc{Great Inagua manor}.

guide.context: Start this after Sequence 4 Memory 1. The long pole is 19 random art pieces from Brig piracy missions in Kenway's Fleet.

steps.text: Keep five high-health Brigs in the fleet and run five piracy missions at once. Before accepting a completed mission report, save; accept it and inspect the newly rolled Brig missions, then reload until one shows the Art Piece reward icon before dispatching a Brig.

Display all 11 portraits and fill the other art categories: 9 paintings, 7 table decorations, 2 large-table decorations, 3 furniture pieces and 27 shelf decorations. The first loot of each warehouse supplies paintings; stores, chests, treasures, local events and Brig piracy missions supply Art Pieces.
Display 1 outfit, any 18 swords, any 12 pistols and all 20 ship models. Models come from story progress, quest rewards and defeating each ship/legendary type.
Walk through every manor display room and interact with any empty slot; owning an item without placing it does not finish the requirement.

achievements.description: Restore all buildings in the Great Inagua village
achievements.summary: Restore the first level of all seven buildings in @loc{Great Inagua village}.

guide.context: The village opens in Sequence 4 Memory 1. The manor facade is cosmetic and not required.

steps.text: Save 23,100 Reales for the required restorations.
Buy level 1 of the General Store (500), Tavern (100), Harbourmaster (500), Brothel (6,000), Campfire (6,000), Treasure Dealer (5,000) and Fisherman's Wharf (5,000).
The unlock fires as soon as all seven village building icons show their first restoration level.

achievements.description: Restore a map from map pieces
achievements.summary: Collect every piece of one @item{treasure map} and restore it.

guide.context: First restore the @loc{Great Inagua Treasure Dealer} at 817,448. Any complete map set works.

steps.text: For the straightforward Digested map, kill the @item{White Jaguar} around 825,439 twice for two pieces; it returns after roughly two hours of play.
Gather 200 Rum by boarding ships around @loc{Gibara}.
Return to the Treasure Dealer and combine the two map pieces with the Rum to restore Digested and unlock the achievement.

achievements.description: Win at each of the different tavern games
achievements.summary: Win one match of each of the three @mechanic{tavern games}.

guide.context: A one-star opponent is enough; you do not need to clear every table.

steps.text: Win Nine-Man Morris at @loc{Salt Key Bank} (467,605).
Win Checkers at @loc{Andreas Island} (543,697).
Win Fanorona at @loc{Crooked Island} (777,520); the third distinct victory triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Ensure the survival of all pirates in a street fight
achievements.summary: Finish a @mechanic{street fight} with every allied pirate still alive.

guide.context: Street fights appear as random chain icons in populated cities. Havana has frequent, low-risk spawns.

steps.text: Roam @loc{Havana} until a chain-icon street fight appears, then enter the event before it expires.
Focus enemies attacking wounded allies and use smoke for crowd control; all pirates must survive until the final enemy falls.

achievements.description: Unlock a smuggler's chest
achievements.summary: Steal the key and open the underwater @item{smuggler's chest} in @loc{Jiguey cave}.

guide.context: The cave entrance is at 535,511.

steps.text: Enter Jiguey cave and kill the ordinary enemy standing beside the brute; loot the smuggler's key from him.
Dive into the cave pool, swim to the locked chest and use the key to open it.

achievements.description: Complete a Templar Hunt sequence
achievements.summary: Complete all four missions in any one @mechanic{Templar Hunt} sequence.

guide.context: Templar Hunts open after Sequence 4 Memory 1. Only one full chain is required.

steps.text: Choose Rhona, Antó, Upton or Opía and follow that contact's map markers.
Complete all four linked missions for the same contact; switching between chains does not count as one completed sequence.

achievements.description: Find all treasure chests in underwater shipwrecks
achievements.summary: Loot all 68 treasure chests across the seven @mechanic{underwater shipwrecks}.

guide.context: The diving bell and all seven wreck icons unlock after Sequence 6 Memory 1, Diving for Medicines. The total is 61 regular chests plus one secret chest at each wreck.

steps.text: At each shipwreck, use the diving bell and keep collecting until the location counter shows every chest complete.
Plan routes between air barrels, hiding spots and bell pockets; use the map pulse to catch chests tucked inside hulls or caves.
Review all seven wreck icons for complete chest counters. Opening the 68th chest unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: Kill a guard ringing a bell
achievements.summary: Kill a guard while he is actively ringing an @item{alarm bell}.

guide.context: A plantation warehouse is the most controlled setup; @loc{Matanzas} at 304,620 works well.

steps.text: Enter the restricted warehouse area and let the guards detect you.
Watch for the bell icon and let one guard reach the bell and begin the ringing animation.
Shoot or assassinate him before the animation ends. Killing him while merely running toward the bell does not count.

achievements.description: Dodge a total of three charge attacks by a Wild Pig
achievements.summary: Dodge three charge attacks from @item{Wild Pigs}.

guide.context: The same animal can provide all three dodges. @loc{Cape Bonavista} (152,588) has an easy Wild Pig spawn.

steps.text: Approach the pig and hold position until its charge warning turns red.
Dodge sideways just before impact, then face it again and repeat twice more without killing it.

achievements.description: Get a perfect harpoon shot on a Great White Shark
achievements.summary: Land a perfect charged harpoon on a @item{Great White Shark}.

guide.context: Use the Great White Shark harpoon spot at @loc{Cruz} (490,303). Only the timing of one throw matters.

steps.text: Track the shark, hold the fire input to charge and keep the reticle centered.
Release exactly as the reticle pulses/contracts to its smallest size; a perfect-hit cue and the achievement confirm the timing.

achievements.description: Parry two Ocelot attacks in rapid succession
achievements.summary: Parry two attacks from one @item{Ocelot} in rapid succession.

guide.context: Find an Ocelot at @loc{Abaco Island} (583,807). Do not damage it between parries.

steps.text: Let the Ocelot attack and press parry on its warning to deflect the first leap.
Immediately move close enough to provoke another attack and parry again before the rapid-success window expires.

achievements.description: Complete every activity in a single location
achievements.summary: Complete every activity and collectible in one @mechanic{location}.

guide.context: Choose a small island with few icons, or wait for the first shipwreck: fully looting a wreck also satisfies the requirement.

steps.text: Synchronize the location's viewpoint, if present, to reveal its activity and collectible counters.
Finish every displayed icon and verify each counter is complete; the unlock occurs as the location reaches 100%.

achievements.description: Kill 10 enemies by hanging them with the rope dart
achievements.summary: Perform 10 hanging kills with the @item{rope dart}.

guide.context: Rope darts unlock in Sequence 3. The kill must use the Hang prompt from a branch or overhead beam, not a normal rope-dart pull.

steps.text: Climb directly above an unaware guard at @loc{Tortuga} (848,350), @loc{Cat Island} (707,666) or the @loc{Kingston warehouse} (605,156).
Aim the rope dart and use the on-screen Hang action, holding it until the guard dies.
Repeat on 10 separate guards. Reloading does not instantly repopulate them; rotate locations or return after several hours of play.

achievements.description: Catch at least five enemies within a single smoke bomb
achievements.summary: Catch at least five enemies inside one @item{smoke bomb} cloud.

guide.context: Smoke bombs unlock in Sequence 2 Memory 1. Ship boardings naturally cluster enough enemies.

steps.text: During a boarding or city chase, let at least five hostile guards crowd around Edward.
Drop one smoke bomb in the middle of the group; all five must be visibly choking from that same cloud.

achievements.description: Use pistols to kill four enemies in a row within five seconds
achievements.summary: Kill four enemies with pistols, in sequence, within five seconds.

guide.context: Craft holster level 4 first: level 3 needs two Rabbit pelts; level 4 needs four Bull Shark skins.

steps.text: At @loc{Matanzas} (304,622), weaken four isolated guards without killing them, then use sleep darts so they stay still.
Stand where all four are in range and confirm all four pistol chambers are loaded.
Shoot each sleeping guard once without pausing; all four deaths must land within the five-second window.

achievements.description: Kill an enemy with a wall takedown
achievements.summary: Kill an enemy with a @mechanic{wall takedown}.

guide.context: Any ordinary guard beside a solid wall works.

steps.text: Fight near a wall and use Kick to drive the guard against it.
While the guard is pinned/stunned, use the displayed Takedown prompt before he steps away.

achievements.description: After a perfect parry, perform a total of four takedowns
achievements.summary: After one perfect parry, chain four @mechanic{takedowns}.

guide.context: Buy @item{Officer's Rapiers} from level 2 of the Great Inagua General Store; their combo allows four takedowns.

steps.text: Start a fight with at least five guards, preferably during a ship boarding or plantation alarm.
Perfect-parry a blue-warning attack, then immediately activate Takedown on a nearby enemy.
Move the prompt from target to target and complete four takedowns before the combo expires.

achievements.description: Kick a berserk enemy caught in smoke off a ship
achievements.summary: Kick a berserk, smoke-stunned enemy off a ship.

guide.context: You need smoke bombs (Sequence 2 Memory 1), berserk darts (Sequence 4 Memory 4) and a Brig with a low rail.

steps.text: Disable and board a Brig, then identify an enemy standing near a low section of railing.
Hit that enemy with a berserk dart; once the purple berserk state is active, throw smoke so he is coughing inside the cloud.

Run at him front-on, kick him against a short rail and use Takedown while both status conditions remain active. Side takedowns often use the hidden blades; repeat if the animation does not knock him fully into the water.

achievements.description: Get a tour of Havana (complete Sequence 2, Memory 1)
achievements.summary: Complete @loc{Sequence 2, Memory 1 — Lively Havana}.

guide.context: This is an automatic story achievement.

steps.text: Follow Stede Bonnet through Havana and finish Sequence 2 Memory 1; it unlocks at the memory-complete screen.

achievements.description: Become captain of the Jackdaw by completing Sequence 2, Memory 6.
achievements.summary: Complete @loc{Sequence 2, Memory 6 — The Treasure Fleet}.

guide.context: This hidden achievement is automatic story progress.

steps.text: Finish The Treasure Fleet and take command of the Jackdaw; the achievement unlocks at the end of the memory.

achievements.displayName: Walls That Hold Back The Wind
achievements.description: Establish a new home by completing Sequence 4, Memory 1.
achievements.summary: Complete @loc{Sequence 4, Memory 1 — This Old Cove}.

guide.context: This hidden achievement is automatic and also opens Great Inagua's restoration systems.

steps.text: Finish This Old Cove; Great Inagua becomes Edward's base and the achievement unlocks.

achievements.description: Witness the end of a legend by completing Sequence 8, Memory 1.
achievements.summary: Complete @loc{Sequence 8, Memory 1 — Do Not Go Gently}.

guide.context: This hidden achievement is automatic story progress.

steps.text: Finish Do Not Go Gently in Sequence 8; the unlock appears at the memory-complete screen.

achievements.description: Stop the Templar plot by completing the main-story mission Ever a Splinter.
achievements.summary: Complete the main-story mission @loc{Ever a Splinter}.

guide.context: This hidden achievement is automatic near the end of Sequence 12. Current references disagree on the memory number, so track the mission title.

steps.text: Continue the main story until Ever a Splinter and finish the mission; no optional objective is required.

achievements.description: Recruit all Officers
achievements.summary: Recruit all five @mechanic{Officers} for the Jackdaw.

guide.context: Two officers are story recruits and three require quest chains. Tobias cannot join until Lucy and Padre have been recruited.

collectibles.name: Adéwalé
collectibles.method: Joins automatically through the story.

collectibles.name: Lucy
collectibles.location: Salt Key Bank, then Great Inagua
collectibles.method: Complete A Proper Shipwright at 446,620, then The One With Gun at 818,445.

collectibles.name: Padre
collectibles.method: Complete A Second Chance at 446,620, then Loyalty Has Its Rewards at 648,348.

collectibles.name: Anne
collectibles.method: Joins automatically at the start of the memory.

collectibles.name: Tobias
collectibles.location: A World Without Gold quest chain
collectibles.method: After Sequence 11 Memory 3, finish That Bastard Maynard (818,446), Not Even a Real Captain (616,154), What the Devil (728,705) and It's a Start (825,444).

achievements.description: Drink until Edward passes out at the Nassau tavern.
achievements.summary: Buy enough drinks to black out at the @loc{Nassau tavern}.

guide.context: This hidden achievement is available once the Nassau tavern is accessible.

steps.text: Interact with the bottle on the tavern counter and keep buying drinks—normally at least five—without leaving.
Continue until Edward collapses and wakes in a haystack; the blackout triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Add one of each ship class to Kenway's fleet
achievements.summary: Send a Schooner, Brig, Frigate and Man-o-War to @mechanic{Kenway's Fleet}.

guide.context: The fleet unlocks in Sequence 4. The four ship classes do not need to remain in the fleet simultaneously.

steps.text: Board one ship of each required class instead of sinking it.
At the boarding resolution screen, choose Send to Kenway's Fleet for each class; the fourth distinct class completes the set.

achievements.description: Board a Lead Convoy ship
achievements.summary: Board the lead ship in a timed @mechanic{Naval Convoy} event.

guide.context: Look for a white timed convoy icon whose map label includes Lead Convoy Ship.

steps.text: Sail to the convoy before its timer expires and identify the marked lead merchant vessel.
Reduce the lead ship to boarding health, pull alongside, board it and complete the boarding objective; sinking it does not count.

achievements.description: Survive a rogue wave taken from the side
achievements.summary: Survive a @mechanic{rogue wave} that strikes the Jackdaw from the side.

guide.context: Sequence 2 Memory 6 guarantees a storm; random rogue waves also occur later in free roam.

steps.text: When the wave warning appears, turn so the wave hits the Jackdaw's broadside rather than the bow.
Hold Brace before impact and survive the damage. The achievement unlocks once the ship clears the wave.

achievements.description: Learn a new shanty
achievements.summary: Learn any new @item{sea shanty}.

guide.context: Chase any music-note collectible through a town; one is also learned through Sequence 8 Memory 1.

steps.text: Touch a shanty sheet to begin its parkour route and follow it until Edward catches the page.
The first collected or story-awarded shanty triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Dash ram a ramming Brig
achievements.summary: Use @mechanic{Ram-Dash} against a Brig while it is attempting to ram you.

guide.context: Recruit Padre through his two quests, then buy the first Jackdaw ram upgrade to unlock Ram-Dash.

steps.text: Engage a Brig and keep the bow facing it until it sounds its horn and starts a ramming run.
Activate Ram-Dash straight into the Brig before its charge ends; an ordinary-speed collision does not count.

achievements.description: Defeat a Pirate Hunter while at maximum Wanted Level
achievements.summary: Defeat a @mechanic{Pirate Hunter} while at wanted level 4.

guide.context: Build wanted level by sinking and boarding ships without lowering notoriety.

steps.text: Continue attacking vessels until all four wanted-level pips are lit.
Wait for the Pirate Hunter to spawn, then sink or board it while the four-pip wanted level is still active.

achievements.description: Defeat all legendary ships
achievements.sortReason: Fully upgrade the Jackdaw before attempting the five legendary ships.
achievements.summary: Defeat all five @mechanic{legendary ships}.

guide.context: Fully upgrade the Jackdaw, recruit all officers and lower combat difficulty before starting. The paired encounter counts as two ships.

collectibles.name: El Impoluto
collectibles.method: Keep range from its lethal ram, use brace during charges and punish after it passes.

collectibles.name: La Dama Negra
collectibles.method: Stay mobile, brace through mortar fire and attack its vulnerable stern/sides.

collectibles.name: HMS Prince
collectibles.method: Fight outside its strongest broadside angle and use mortars/fire barrels during turns.

collectibles.name: HMS Fearless
collectibles.method: In the paired battle, damage both ships evenly so the survivor does not spend long in its enraged state.

collectibles.name: Royal Sovereign
collectibles.method: Finish the second ship immediately after the first; defeating both completes the last legendary encounter.

achievements.description: Perform 3 perfect braces
achievements.summary: Perform three @mechanic{perfect braces} aboard the Jackdaw.

guide.context: Recruit Lucy through A Proper Shipwright and The One With Gun to enable the perfect-brace mechanic.

steps.text: Fight a ship with readable cannon volleys and wait for an incoming-attack warning.
Press and hold Brace just before the projectiles hit—not as soon as the warning appears—to earn the perfect-brace cue.
Land three perfect timings across any naval fights; they do not need to be in one encounter.

achievements.description: Unlock the secondary firing mode on a Jackdaw weapon
achievements.summary: Unlock @item{burning shot}, the secondary mode for the Jackdaw's cannons.

guide.context: This is an automatic story unlock.

steps.text: Complete Sequence 3 Memory 6, Proper Defenses; burning shot becomes available after the mission and triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Equip new cosmetics in each of the Jackdaw's vanity slots
achievements.summary: Equip a new cosmetic in all five @mechanic{Jackdaw vanity slots}.

guide.context: Restore the Great Inagua Harbourmaster at 818,440 for 500 Reales, then open Appearance.

steps.text: Change Sails, Figurehead, Hull, Wheel and Crew to an option other than the currently equipped one.
Back out after all five slots show a changed selection; price and rarity do not matter.

achievements.description: Craft an item
achievements.summary: Craft any @item{item}.

guide.context: Sequence 3 Memory 1 includes a mandatory crafting tutorial.

steps.text: Follow the tutorial to use gathered materials at the anvil; the first completed recipe unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: Spend 50,000 Reales
achievements.summary: Spend a cumulative 50,000 @item{Reales}.

guide.context: All purchases count, so normal Great Inagua restorations and Jackdaw upgrades will exceed the requirement.

steps.text: Prioritize required buildings, equipment and ship upgrades rather than buying disposable items solely for the counter.
The achievement triggers when lifetime spending passes 50,000; money need not be spent in one transaction.

achievements.description: Fully upgrade the Jackdaw
achievements.summary: Buy every upgrade for the @mechanic{Jackdaw}.

guide.context: With the diving bell obtained free in Sequence 6 Memory 1, fully upgrading the Harbourmaster and Jackdaw costs 309,800 Reales, 4,755 metal, 2,750 wood and 550 cloth.

steps.text: Loot six shipwreck plans: Hull Armor at San Ignacio (348,744), Mortars at Antocha (600,636), Ram at La Concepción (150,271), Swivel Guns at Devil's Eye Caverns (456,332), Broadside Cannon Number at The Blue Hole (440,145), and Round Shot Strength at Kabah Ruins (738,120).

Dig six treasure-map plans: Ambergris Key→Misteriosa (28,160→271,178), Santanillas→San Juan (191,218→455,462), Cayman Sound→Petite Caverne (298,311→863,235), Tortuga→Matanzas (851,352→312,617), Mariguana→Andreas Island (847,514→544,693), and Petite Caverne→Tulum (862,237→40,372).
Board ships in harder regions, loot Captain's Lockboxes and capture forts to build the required cargo. Sell surplus Rum/Sugar but reserve metal, wood and cloth for upgrades.
Fully upgrade the Great Inagua Harbourmaster, then purchase every level in weapons, armor, storage and utility before starting the legendary ships.

achievements.description: Consume 20 food items
achievements.summary: Consume 20 @item{food pickups} while injured.

guide.context: Berry bushes and soup bowls count; health flasks do not. Food can only be consumed when Edward has missing health.

steps.text: Let a weak enemy damage Edward, escape combat, then eat a berry or soup pickup in the environment.
Repeat at storehouses and settlements as food respawns until the cumulative 20th pickup is consumed.

achievements.description: Interact with all seven friendly animals
achievements.summary: Interact with all eight friendly animals—the current build requires one more than the Steam text says.

guide.context: If an animal fails to appear, fast-travel away, advance to morning and return. The interaction prompt, not merely seeing the animal, records it.

collectibles.name: Monkey
collectibles.location: Great Inagua manor or Jackdaw cabin
collectibles.method: Complete Havana's Monkey Business Local Event, equip the monkey in the pet slot, then pet it.

collectibles.name: Turtle
collectibles.method: Approach slowly and use the interaction prompt.

collectibles.name: Dog
collectibles.method: Pet the dog near the dock area.

collectibles.name: Pig
collectibles.location: Kingston, fenced area by the General Store
collectibles.method: Enter the pen and interact with the pig.

collectibles.name: Chicken
collectibles.location: Kingston, around town or near the pig pen
collectibles.method: Use the prompt on any friendly chicken.

collectibles.name: Cow
collectibles.location: Kingston, east pen between the Monkey and Harbourmaster icons
collectibles.method: Enter the fenced field and interact with the cow.

collectibles.name: Cat
collectibles.location: Kingston market, north of the central viewpoint
collectibles.method: Pet the cat in the market square.

collectibles.name: Parrot
collectibles.method: Interact through the cage; alternatively use the parrot at a fully upgraded Great Inagua General Store.

achievements.description: Shoot down all the hanging bodies in Long Bay
achievements.summary: Shoot down all three hanging bodies in @loc{Long Bay}.

guide.context: Long Bay at 498,226 opens after Sequence 10 Memory 3. Shoot each corpse in the head from close range; the aiming cursor turns red when the shot is aligned correctly.

collectibles.name: Viewpoint body
collectibles.location: Top of Long Bay's northern viewpoint
collectibles.method: Climb to the top platform, aim at the head until the cursor is red, and shoot until the body falls.

collectibles.name: Beach-path body 1
collectibles.location: Roots above the start of the right-hand path near the beach
collectibles.method: Jump from the viewpoint toward the beach, enter the right path back toward the ship, look up and headshot the first corpse.

collectibles.name: Beach-path body 2
collectibles.location: Beside body 2 above the same roots
collectibles.method: The last corpse hangs very close to body 2; headshot it from beneath the roots and confirm all three bodies have fallen.

achievements.description: Discover the broken diving bell at the bottom of Black Trench.
achievements.summary: Reach the broken @item{diving bell} deep below @loc{Black Trench}.

guide.context: The Black Trench wreck at 184,425 is available after Sequence 6 Memory 1.

steps.text: Descend from your bell, swim forward-right to the large wreck and use the nearby air barrel.
Dive straight down into the deep trench until the broken diving bell comes into view.
Swim around the broken bell and its base; if it does not unlock immediately, circle it once at close range.

achievements.description: Visit every location in the game
achievements.summary: Visit all 57 named @mechanic{locations} in the Caribbean.

guide.context: Story destinations count automatically, but several sea locations require deliberately crossing their discovery boundary.

steps.text: Sail through every remaining white question mark and named island/settlement until it becomes revealed on the map.
Approach each fort closely enough to reveal its defenses; capturing the fort is not required for this achievement.
Enter all seven shipwreck dive zones rather than only sailing over their icons.
Compare region counters and map filters for a total of 57; revisit any pale/unresolved icon until its location banner appears.

achievements.description: Break 50 potted plants
achievements.summary: Break 50 distinct @item{potted plants}.

guide.context: Havana's streets, courtyards and balconies contain many pots. Respawned copies of a pot already broken do not advance the counter.

steps.text: Walk a systematic loop through @loc{Havana}, meleeing every flowerpot on the ground, walls and accessible balconies.
Move to new districts or cities rather than farming a respawn route; the 50th unique pot triggers the achievement.

achievements.description: Swim a total of 1000m underwater, excluding underwater shipwrecks
achievements.summary: Swim 1,000 cumulative metres underwater outside shipwreck zones.

guide.context: Distance inside the seven diving-bell shipwreck areas is excluded, but ordinary sea, beach and cave swimming counts.

steps.text: At any calm coast, dive and swim long laps just below the surface so you can refill breath quickly.
Continue across normal exploration sessions; the counter is cumulative and unlocks as soon as 1,000 valid metres are reached.
